submission_rule: Do not duplicate submitted IFS applications. Do not submit gated IFS routes without evidenced partners, eligibility facts, finance basis, facilities, staff count, host status, or deployment assets.

non_lead_or_excluded_routes.gate: active farming, growing, or forestry business in England required
non_lead_or_excluded_routes.action: Do not apply as R&A; use only if an eligible farm client appoints Aureon as facilitator.

non_lead_or_excluded_routes.gate: farming/growing/forestry lead and another farming business required
non_lead_or_excluded_routes.action: Do not apply as R&A; use only if an eligible farm-led consortium invites Aureon.

non_lead_or_excluded_routes.gate: UK registered academic institution lead required
non_lead_or_excluded_routes.action: Do not apply as R&A; prepare only as invited partner or subcontractor to an eligible academic lead.

non_lead_or_excluded_routes.gate: HE/FE/RTO/Catapult lead and 4+ FTE business partner required
non_lead_or_excluded_routes.action: Do not submit unless lead institution is confirmed and 4+ FTE evidence exists; current local evidence records 1 FTE.

non_lead_or_excluded_routes.gate: public sector research organisation or eligible public sector body required
non_lead_or_excluded_routes.action: Do not apply as R&A; monitor only for partner-led route.

non_lead_or_excluded_routes.gate: ZEV manufacturing facility plan, site, staffing, and capex evidence required
non_lead_or_excluded_routes.action: Do not submit without facility evidence.
Exclude from grant-submit queue unless repayable finance is explicitly approved with capacity evidence.

controlled_partner_language: R&A Consulting and Brokerage Services Ltd proposes Aureon Evidence OS as a local-first evidence automation and assurance work package. The work package supports source inventory, claim classification, reproducible workflow records, benchmark reporting, risk tagging, and funder-ready audit trails. It does not claim validated autonomous decision-making, regulated diagnostic capability, confirmed partner access, manufacturing facilities, maritime assets, or hardware access unless those facts are provided and evidenced by the lead partner.
